Public Relations And Publicity Unit

The Promotion Unit

of Doğuş University is in communication with individuals and organizations that the institution is connected to or would benefit from connecting with. It carries out studies to ensure that Doğuş University reaches its target audience in line with its mission, vision, and core values.

Activities such as fairs, panels, conferences, talks, and visits to schools and preparatory courses are among its primary activities. The Promotion Unit operates under the Rectorate in all its activities.

It ensures that relationships based on mutual understanding and trust are established and maintained with individuals and organisations that contribute positively to Doğuş University, and that mutual support is provided when necessary.

As the face of Doğuş University to the outside world, it conducts activities aimed at accurate promotion of the institution, creating a positive image among target audiences, and increasing its preference rate.

It is essential that all activities are shaped according to the Corporate Identity, institutional culture, and the needs and expectations of the University, and that activities are carried out regularly and systematically.
